argument_hint: none (balanced coverage); user gate decision: backward compatibility not required

phases.title: Current-State Audit
exit_criteria: Findings table covers all 7 pain-point categories with file/line evidence
MCP Tool Surface Inventory enumerates every tool in tools/mcp-servers/drawio/src/ with file:line refs
Owning layer (agent / MCP / shared / validator / icon-library) identified for each finding
Sample real outputs (site/public/demo/*.drawio) inspected and quoted

phases.title: Target-State Design
exit_criteria: Quality rubric covers 7 dimensions with 0-4 anchored scale
Golden scenarios pack defined; each pain-point exercised by >=1 scenario
Validation strategy names integration points (benchmark-e2e.mjs, validate-drawio-files.mjs)
Hard constraints (agent context size, pure-Deno MCP) re-stated in roll-out section

phases.title: Implementation
exit_criteria: All P0 tasks merged; P1 tasks merged or scheduled; P2 tasks tracked in issues

phases.title: Validation & Roll-out
exit_criteria: Golden scenarios regenerated post-change; side-by-side diff inspected for each
benchmark-e2e.mjs reports >=40% reduction in regen/retry-rate per .drawio vs. captured baseline
validator extensions pass on all 7 golden scenarios
All rubric dimensions score >=3/4 averaged across golden scenarios

workstreams.title: Diagram type dispatch in 04-Design
workstreams.rationale: Agent currently emits a single architecture template per project; the workflow has implicit support for logical/network/sequence/deployment diagrams but no selection logic.

workstreams.title: Variant-aware icon prompting
workstreams.rationale: Library is current (V23-Nov-2025) but agent prompts do not disambiguate service tiers/SKUs; fuzzy match returns generic family icon for ambiguous queries.

workstreams.title: Semantic zone templates (subscription / region / trust boundary)
workstreams.rationale: Skill enforces VNet/RG groups but provides no templates for subscription scope, region label, trust-boundary perimeter, or external/internet zones.

workstreams.title: Legend & annotation conventions
workstreams.rationale: Legend is mandatory per validation-checklist but creation is fully manual; no copy-paste template; data-flow annotations are unstructured strings.

workstreams.title: Large-graph decomposition strategy
workstreams.rationale: Agent has only an effort-tuning note for >20 resources and a 25-tool-call circuit breaker; no rules for splitting into overview + detail diagrams or paginating across <diagram> pages.

workstreams.title: Auto-arrange / hierarchical layout (proposed new capability)
workstreams.rationale: Source has no layout engine; suggest-group-sizing is formula-based vertical stacking only; all coordinates are caller-supplied. Proposed: pure-Deno layered layout (dagre-style).

workstreams.title: Expanded style presets (fonts / line weights / themes)
workstreams.rationale: get-style-presets returns colors and edge styles only; missing fonts, line weights, theme variants. Skill prescribes 14-16/12/11/10/9pt typography but agent has no preset to enforce.

workstreams.title: Legend generation tool (proposed new capability)
workstreams.rationale: No tool emits a legend block. Proposed: generate-legend scans current diagram for unique icons + edge-label tokens and emits a self-contained legend group.

workstreams.title: Nested-zone template tool (proposed new capability)
workstreams.rationale: create-groups + add-cells-to-group exist but require manual nesting; no template for Subscription -> RG -> VNet -> Subnet hierarchy. Proposed: apply-zone-template.

workstreams.title: Parallel placeholder resolution + scale perf
workstreams.rationale: finish-diagram resolves placeholders serially; bottlenecks at >100 icons. Pure in-memory icon cache makes Promise.all batching safe.

workstreams.title: Variant-aware shape search
workstreams.rationale: search-shapes prioritises exact title then fuzzy fallback; no boost for tier/SKU keywords (premium, managed instance, hyperscale).

workstreams.title: Diagram quality rubric (canonical)
workstreams.rationale: Validation-checklist references a 10-point rubric but no canonical 0-4 scale per dimension exists; needed by validator extensions and benchmark scoring.

workstreams.title: Golden scenario fixtures
workstreams.rationale: No fixed evaluation set exists; each PR is judged on ad-hoc projects. Stable fixtures enable before/after comparison and regression detection.

workstreams.title: Validator extensions (overlap / density / type-fit / semantics / legend)
workstreams.rationale: Validator covers structural integrity + APEX palette + icon presence; no overlap, density, semantic-zone, type-fit, or legend checks.

workstreams.title: Icon manifest enrichment + freshness check
workstreams.rationale: manifest.json records sourceVersion (V23-November-2025) but has no per-service variant taxonomy and no automated drift detection against MS Learn.

workstreams.title: Benchmark regen/retry-rate metric
workstreams.rationale: benchmark-e2e.mjs scores 8 dimensions but timing dimension tracks duration only, not retry count. 08-iteration-log.json has no per-artifact retry field.

tasks.title: Author canonical quality-rubric.md in drawio skill references
tasks.rationale: Single source of truth for the 7-dimension 0-4 rubric. Lives in skill references (not agent body) to respect agent context budget; validator and benchmark both consume it.
acceptance_criteria: File at .github/skills/drawio/references/quality-rubric.md exists
All 7 dimensions present with anchored 0-4 scale matching plan.md
Linked from SKILL.md, SKILL.digest.md (>=summary line), SKILL.minimal.md (>=pointer)
Validator and benchmark-e2e reference the rubric file path

tasks.title: Author golden-scenario fixture pack (7 scenarios)
tasks.rationale: Stable evaluation set covering all 7 pain-point categories. Required for side-by-side validation and regen-rate baseline.
acceptance_criteria: tools/tests/drawio-golden/<scenario-id>/{prompt.md, expected.json} exists for 7 scenarios
expected.json fields: diagram_type, min_resources, max_resources, expected_zones[], expected_edge_labels[], expected_legend_required
All 7 pain-point categories exercised by >=1 scenario per coverage matrix in plan.md
README.md describes how to run a scenario through the agent
Path correction (delivery): fixtures live under tools/tests/drawio-golden/ to match repo convention; schema at tools/schemas/drawio-golden-scenario.schema.json

tasks.title: Add render-golden-diff.mjs for side-by-side before/after comparison
tasks.rationale: Validation strategy requires visual side-by-side at every PR; needs reproducible rendering pipeline against fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: tools/scripts/render-golden-diff.mjs renders each fixture pre/post and writes paired PNGs
Outputs HTML index with side-by-side panels per scenario
Exits non-zero if any fixture fails to render

tasks.title: Enrich manifest.json with variant taxonomy
tasks.rationale: Encode service variants (App Service tiers, SQL editions, Storage redundancy) so search-shapes and agent prompts can disambiguate. Pure data; no MCP runtime change required.
acceptance_criteria: manifest.json gains variants{} mapping service-name -> [variant labels]
Schema documented in assets/drawio-libraries/azure-icons/README.md
Coverage for at minimum: App Service, SQL, Storage, Cosmos DB, AKS, Key Vault, Front Door, App Gateway, Container Apps, Functions
DELIVERED: assets/drawio-libraries/azure-icons/manifest.json gains variants{} mapping for 30 service families.

tasks.title: Add check-azure-icons-freshness.mjs
tasks.rationale: Detect drift when Microsoft publishes a new icon-set release (V24+); avoid silently shipping stale icons.
acceptance_criteria: Script fetches MS Learn icon-set release page and parses current version label
Compares against manifest.sourceVersion; warns on drift
Wired into npm script (e.g., npm run check:azure-icons-freshness) and optional CI weekly job
DELIVERED: tools/scripts/check-azure-icons-freshness.mjs + npm script. Graceful offline; --strict flag.

tasks.title: Add overlap detection check to validate-drawio-files.mjs
tasks.rationale: Layout pain-point currently has no automated check; AABB collision among siblings is deterministic and cheap.
acceptance_criteria: New check enumerates sibling vertices and reports overlapping AABBs as advisory by default
APEX_DRAWIO_RUBRIC=strict promotes to error
False-positive rate <=5% on existing .drawio files in repo
Decision OQ-3 (resolved): false-positive ceiling fixed at <=5% measured against golden-scenario fixtures (T-002) and existing repo .drawio inventory

DELIVERED: validate-drawio-files.mjs gains Check 15 (Sibling Icon Overlap, T-006). Models rendered label box (valueLen × fontSize × 0.7 width, fontSize × 1.4 height). Tuned against G1-G7 baseline: 2/14 files flagged (G2, G6), 0 false positives, current FP rate <5% per D-OQ3. Advisory by default; APEX_DRAWIO_RUBRIC=strict promotes to error. Caps reports at 8/file. Documented in references/validation-checklist.md.

tasks.title: Add density check (cells per canvas page)
tasks.rationale: Scaling pain-point indicator: warn when cell count vs. canvas-page area exceeds threshold.
acceptance_criteria: Threshold defined in references/quality-rubric.md and consumed by validator
Warns when ratio exceeds threshold; suggests pagination or decomposition
Strict mode escalates to error

tasks.title: Add diagram-type fit check by filename pattern
tasks.rationale: Type-mismatch pain-point: detect when a runtime/sequence diagram lacks expected signatures (sequence-style edge labels) or a network diagram lacks zones.
acceptance_criteria: Per-pattern signature rules declared in validator (filename pattern -> expected signatures)
Patterns covered: 03-des-diagram*, 04-dependency-diagram*, 04-runtime-diagram*, 07-ab-diagram*
Advisory by default; strict mode escalates

Promoted P1->P0 post baseline capture (T-012): G3 (type-fit 4/4), G6 (4/4), G7 (4/4) scored highest on type-fit, while G5 (3/4 misclassified MG hierarchy) scored lowest on layout. Type-fit signature is the highest-leverage validator extension.

tasks.title: Add semantic-zone presence check
tasks.rationale: Semantics pain-point: when resource count >10, expect at least one container/group cell representing a zone.
acceptance_criteria: Warning when image-cell count >10 and no container/group cells present
Threshold and rule documented in references/quality-rubric.md
Strict mode escalates

tasks.title: Add legend-presence check for architecture deliverables
tasks.rationale: Labels pain-point: legend is mandatory per checklist but not enforced; flag missing legend cell when image cells exceed 8.
acceptance_criteria: Detects legend by convention (named cell or labelled group) consistent with T-021 template
Warns when image-cell count >8 and no legend detected
Strict mode escalates

tasks.title: Extend 08-iteration-log.json with artifact_retries and update benchmark scoring
tasks.rationale: benchmark-e2e currently tracks duration only; per-diagram regen rate needs first-class field.
acceptance_criteria: Schema for 08-iteration-log.json updated with entries[].artifact_retries{ <filename>: <int> }
validate-session-state validates new field
scoreTimingPerformance() (or new scoreRegenerationRate()) aggregates *.drawio retries and computes mean retries per .drawio
Reported as a new dimension in 08-benchmark-scores.json and the markdown report

Delivery deviation (recorded): the new schema is enforced via .vscode/settings.json json.schemas association (same pattern as lesson-log.schema.json), not by extending validate-session-state.mjs. Rationale: validate-session-state.mjs is scoped to session-state files only; iteration-log is a separate artifact. Schema lives at tools/schemas/iteration-log.schema.json. Composite weight currently 0; flipped to non-zero by T-012 once baseline is captured.

tasks.title: Capture regen-rate baseline on main HEAD
tasks.rationale: Before any code change lands, capture pre-change regen rate so post-change reduction can be measured.
acceptance_criteria: Baseline captured by running npm run e2e:benchmark against current main HEAD over the 7 golden scenarios
Snapshot stored at tests/fixtures/drawio-baseline/regen-baseline.json (mean and per-scenario regen rate)
Target reduction set to >=40% mean regen rate per .drawio (rationale: 1.4x avg today implies sub-1.0 after change)
Procedure documented in references/quality-rubric.md or sibling reference

tasks.title: Add diagram-type dispatch to 04-design.agent.md (<=30 added lines)
tasks.rationale: Selects logical / network / sequence / deployment diagram type from session-state inputs; bulk detail lives in references/diagram-types.md to keep agent under 350 lines.
acceptance_criteria: Agent body net delta <=30 lines (current 411 -> <=441)
Dispatch reads decisions.architecture_type or workload_pattern from session state
References/diagram-types.md contains tool-call patterns; agent body links only
agent-frontmatter and context-optimization linters pass
Decision OQ-1 (resolved): dispatch lives in agent (not a new MCP tool) per user gate review

<=10 lines net delta

tasks.title: Implement auto-arrange MCP tool (pure-Deno layered layout)
tasks.rationale: No layout engine exists today; pure-Deno port of dagre-style layered algorithm satisfies pure-Deno constraint.
acceptance_criteria: New tool auto-arrange registered in tool_definitions.ts; handler in tools.ts or new layout module
Inputs: vertex IDs, edges, optional constraints (rankdir, spacing); Outputs: x,y per vertex
Pure standard library + existing deno.json deps; no new external deps unless deno-compatible and justified
Performance: arranges 50-vertex graph in <200ms on Deno bench
Tests added in tests/auto_arrange.test.ts
Backward-compat: existing diagrams unaffected unless tool explicitly invoked
DEFERRED: full graph layout engine warrants own commit. Mitigation: T-007 density check + T-023 decomposition rules.

tasks.title: Implement detect-overlap MCP tool
tasks.rationale: Provides authoritative AABB collision report; complements validator's structural overlap check (T-006) but available at build time.
acceptance_criteria: Tool detect-overlap returns sibling AABB collisions with cell IDs and overlap area
Pure-Deno; no new deps
Tests cover nested/non-nested cases
DEFERRED (superseded by T-006): validator-side overlap check covers the practical use case.

tasks.title: Extend get-style-presets with fonts / line weights / theme variants
tasks.rationale: Agent enforces 14-16/12/11/10/9pt typography manually; presets centralise the convention and reduce drift.
acceptance_criteria: Presets returned: font.title, font.group, font.service, font.edge, font.footer; line-weight.primary/secondary; theme.light/dark/print
Backward-compat: existing color and edge presets unchanged
Tests updated
DELIVERED: get-style-presets handler gains apex-arch-fills/zones/edges, fonts, line-weights, themes. Additive; existing presets unchanged.

tasks.title: Implement generate-legend MCP tool
tasks.rationale: Legend creation is currently fully manual on the agent side; server-side generation uses authoritative diagram state.
acceptance_criteria: Scans current diagram for unique icons + edge-label tokens
Emits a self-contained legend group cell block consistent with T-021 template
Idempotent: re-invocation updates rather than duplicates the legend
Tests cover empty, small (<=8 icons), and large (>20 icons) cases
Decision OQ-2 (resolved): legend positioned relative to current diagram bounds by default; caller may supply optional fixed x/y override
DEFERRED: generate-legend MCP tool requires schema+handler+tests. Mitigation: T-021 legend-template.md provides copy-paste snippets.

tasks.title: Implement apply-zone-template MCP tool
tasks.rationale: Codifies subscription -> RG -> VNet -> Subnet nesting that today requires manual create-groups + add-cells-to-group orchestration.
acceptance_criteria: Tool accepts a zone manifest (subscriptions[].resource_groups[].vnets[].subnets[]) and emits nested groups
Returns mapping zone-id -> cell-id for downstream child placement
Pure-Deno; tests cover single-sub / multi-sub / multi-region
DEFERRED: apply-zone-template MCP tool requires full feature addition. Mitigation: T-019 semantic-zones.md provides snippets.

tasks.title: Parallelise finish-diagram placeholder resolution
tasks.rationale: Today serial; in-memory cache is thread-safe (Deno is single-threaded; awaiting Promise.all is safe). Bottleneck shows at >100 placeholders.
acceptance_criteria: Promise.all batched resolution (batch size configurable, default 32)
Bench shows >=3x throughput improvement at 100 placeholders
Backward-compat: same XML output bytes as serial path
Tests updated; bench added in tests/performance.bench.ts
DELIVERED (clarified scope): single-pass replace with global regex replaces O(N×M) per-placeholder scans. Promise.all not applicable — resolver is synchronous in-memory cache.

tasks.title: Extend get-diagram-stats with density warning
tasks.rationale: Surface scaling pressure earlier in the agent loop; complements validator T-007.
acceptance_criteria: Stats response includes density_warning bool and suggested_action string
Threshold consistent with T-007 / quality-rubric.md
Tests cover under/at/over-threshold
DELIVERED: get-diagram-stats now returns cells_per_sqpx, density_warning, density_failure, suggested_action.

tasks.title: Boost variant matches in search-shapes ranking
tasks.rationale: When query mentions tier/SKU keywords (premium, managed instance, hyperscale), prefer variant-specific icons over family default.
acceptance_criteria: Ranker consumes manifest.variants{} (T-004) when present
Tests: query 'app service premium plan' returns Premium-tier icon ahead of generic App Service Plan
No regression on existing unit tests
DELIVERED: searchAzureIcons gains +0.15 variant boost when query has tier/SKU keyword AND candidate title contains keyword. 22 keywords from icon-variants.md taxonomy. All 918 test steps pass.

tasks.title: Author run-drawio-quality-bench.mjs orchestrator
tasks.rationale: Single command runs golden-scenario regen + side-by-side render + regen-rate comparison + validator suite.
acceptance_criteria: tools/scripts/run-drawio-quality-bench.mjs orchestrates T-002 fixtures, T-003 diff render, T-011 metrics, T-013 backcompat, validator suite
Emits consolidated PASS/FAIL summary and per-dimension scores
Runnable as npm run bench:drawio-quality

tasks.title: Per-PR review checklist linking workstreams to validators and golden scenarios
tasks.rationale: Ensures every uplift PR exercises the relevant golden(s) and validator extension(s).
acceptance_criteria: Checklist file referenced from PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
For each workstream, lists which goldens to regen and which validator checks to assert
Reviewer can mark PASS/FAIL per row

tasks.title: Enforce single-batch search-shapes in 04-Design agent body
tasks.rationale: T-012 baseline shows skill-batching drift in 4/7 captures (G3=3 calls, G4=4 calls, G5=2 calls, G6=2 calls). The skill says 'one batched call' but the rule isn't sticky at higher complexity. Promote from skill guidance to agent-body contract.
acceptance_criteria: Agent body (.github/agents/04-design.agent.md) gains an explicit single-batch contract for search-shapes (<=10 lines added)
Detail in .github/skills/drawio/references/icon-variants.md (T-018 dependency)
Validates against G3, G4 captures: post-uplift, search-shapes call count for the equivalent prompt is exactly 1
DELIVERED via Wave 3 — Diagram contract rule #2 in 04-design.agent.md.

tasks.title: Return inline diagram_xml from add-cells / add-cells-to-group / finish-diagram (proposed)
tasks.rationale: T-012 baseline shows XML-extraction round-trips are the dominant friction (present in all 7 captures, ~25% of total friction). Today the agent has to read the MCP response from disk via python json.load + temp-file shuffles between every MCP call. If the MCP returned diagram_xml inline (already in response, but the agent doesn't trust the size), the round-trips disappear.
acceptance_criteria: MCP responses include diagram_xml inline at all sizes (no truncation in normal path)
Agent's standard pattern updated to read response directly without temp-file extraction
Pure-Deno; no new deps
Tests confirm response size up to 200KB inline; behaviour unchanged for larger payloads
DELIVERED (partial — agent-side): MCP already returns diagram_xml inline; Wave 3 + this commit update agent body to pass it directly when payload < 50 KB. Server-side compression deferred.

tasks.title: Native multi-page diagram support in MCP server (proposed)
tasks.rationale: T-012 G6 capture shows the agent had to write a custom Python ElementTree merger to combine 3 single-page outputs. That's friction event 6/6 on G6. finish-diagram is single-page-only. A multi-page mode (or a new merge-pages tool) would eliminate this and align with the T-023 decomposition pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Either: (a) finish-diagram accepts `pages: [{name, diagram_xml}]` array and emits multi-page mxfile, OR (b) new merge-pages tool composes already-finished single pages into a multi-page mxfile
Pure-Deno; tests confirm parity with the Python merger output for G6's 3-page case
Reduces G6 friction from 6 to 5 (one event eliminated)
DEFERRED: native multi-page finish-diagram requires full feature addition. Mitigation: T-023 documents the Python ElementTree merger pattern (G6 succeeded with it).
